Scores of fans fill the stands here at Kyoto Racecourse.

Today's main race, the Tenno Sho, has begun, and cheers
erupt from the crowd as they race by us for the first time.

In the lead currently is the number-two favorite, Seiun Sky!
The champion Mejiro Bright has placed herself firmly in the
middle of the pack.

As for the favorite to win, Special Week... She's directly
behind Seiun Sky, in perfect pace-chasing position!
Hey, wait, isn't this a little too soon?

No, this is exactly what we want. Seiun Sky has run away
with a lead against her before.

If she wants to avoid a repeat of that situation, that
position is perfect.
Way to use your noggin, Spe.
That's it, Bright. That's the spot.
This way, you'll pass them for sure!
The race continues into the backstretch.

In the lead is Seiun Sky. At the Kikuka Sho, this area
proved the perfect place for her to catch her breath.

But with Special Week right on her tail, that might not
happen.

With her watching my every move, I can't just do whatever
I want.
But hey, that just means...
No tricks this time—this is a contest of skill!

All that's left is the timing of my final spurt. I have to time
it so I can pass Sei, and...
Keep Bright from catching up!

The runners are rounding the fourth corner and headed
into the homestretch! The rest of the pack is starting to
pick up the pace! This is where the real race begins!
Wait, already?!

Special Week makes her move, with Seiun Sky still in front!
From the outside comes Mejiro Bright!

It's down to these three racers! As predicted, the final
battle of the Tenno Sho will take place between them on
this final straightaway!
Urrraaaaaugh!

Seiun Sky tries to fight back, but here's Special Week!
Special Week surges past her!
Hraaaah!

In the lead is Special Week! Special Week is pulling away
from the pack!
Bright...
I don't just want you to win...
I want us to win...
Together!
HAAAAH!

From the outside comes Bright! Mejiro Bright makes her
move! She approaches Special Week at incredible speed!

This is the power of our reigning champ! Will Special Week
fall here?!
Spe!
Spe!
It all comes down to this! Mom, Mama...
My teammates...
I won't let you down!
Just a little moooore!

What's this?! She's going even faster! Special Week hits the
gas and maintains her lead!
HAAAAH!

It's Special Week! Mejiro Bright is hot on her tail, but she
can't catch up!
Special Week crosses the finish line!
Overthrowing the champion Mejiro Bright...
Special Week...
Has conquered the Tenno Sho!
